title: T-083 — compliance_docs table + storage policy + indexes (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-083 — Compliance docs schema

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §19
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create compliance_docs table per §19 DDL with MIME allowlist + 20 MB size CHECK + version UNIQUE + soft-delete + indexes + RLS.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0083_compliance_docs.sql per §19 DDL: compliance_docs (id PK, tenant_id, product_code FK fa ON DELETE CASCADE, doc_type CHECK in CoA/SDS/Spec/Cert/Other, title CHECK 3-300, file_path, mime_type CHECK in 3 allowed values, file_size_bytes CHECK <=20MB, version_number, expires_at, uploaded_by_user, deleted_at, R13 audit cols, UNIQUE(tenant_id, product_code, doc_type, version_number)).
2. Indexes: (tenant_id, product_code) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL + (tenant_id, expires_at) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND expires_at IS NOT NULL.
3. ENABLE RLS + tenant_isolation policy.
4. Drizzle schema + barrel.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0083_compliance_docs.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/compliance-docs.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/compliance-docs.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0083 runs, when an INSERT with mime_type='image/png' is attempted, then it fails CHECK constraint per §19 MIME allowlist (PDF/XLSX/DOCX only)
2. Given migration 0083 runs, when an INSERT with file_size_bytes=21000000 is attempted, then it fails CHECK constraint per §19 max 20 MB
3. Given two rows exist with same tenant+product+doc_type but different version_number, when the SELECT runs, then both rows are visible (UNIQUE allows distinct versions); when an INSERT duplicates version_number, then it fails per §19 versioning contract

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/compliance-docs.test.ts asserting CHECKs + UNIQUE versioning + RLS before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test compliance-docs'

## Risk red lines
- Do not extend MIME allowlist beyond PDF/XLSX/DOCX
- Do not allow files >20 MB
- Do not skip RLS or partial indexes

pipeline_inputs.description: Create compliance_docs table with MIME allowlist + 20 MB CHECK + UNIQUE versioning + partial indexes + RLS per §19.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration emits the table verbatim per §19 DDL. Partial indexes for active vs expiring rows. RLS enforced.
